calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ronald K. Losch, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Phoenix Global Financial, Inc., Assignee of IXC Holdings, Inc., dba Telekenex.
Theresa Zabit, Contracts Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant UE Vision, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on October 27, 2017.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant UEVision was filed on December 5, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 8, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Phoenix Global Financial, Inc., Assignee of IXC Holdings, Inc., dba Telekenex, and against the Defaulted Defendant UE Vision, Inc., as follows:

Principal/Damages - $9,729.68.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,368.12.
Attorney Fees - $1,300.00.
Costs - $1,493.07, for a total judgment in the amount of $16,890.87.

Proposed judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
